data.name: Your Anime Waifu
data.detailed_description: Slide image parts to their correct positions to be rewarded with complete images. Enjoy and appreciate tasteful art pieces in a gallery at your own pace.
data.about_the_game: Slide image parts to their correct positions to be rewarded with complete images. Enjoy and appreciate tasteful art pieces in a gallery at your own pace.
data.short_description: Classic slide puzzle anime game with original art

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Dual Core
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 Capable
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 備註: Mouse and keyboard
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Quad Core
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 Capable
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 備註: Mouse and keyboard
